name: Pantry Staple Reset
description: Build a lean pantry restock list from current staples, upcoming meals, and real gaps without overbuying or making dietary assumptions.
trigger_keywords: group this grocery list by aisle
use_cases: Turn a rough pantry inventory into a practical restock plan.
Compare current staples with upcoming meals to find only real gaps.
Group needed items by store aisle for easier shopping.
Create a lean cart that separates must-buy items from optional extras.
